skill.body:
# Bulk Operations and Asset Search
## Overview This skill covers the efficient management of large asset datasets through bulk actions and global search capabilities, enabling administrators and managers to make system-wide changes quickly and accurately.
## Global Search - Search across all asset fields: name, serial number, category, department, status, assigned user - Real-time filtering with multi-field criteria - Saved search templates for recurring queries - Export search results to CSV or Excel
## Bulk Operations
### Status Updates - Select multiple assets and apply a single status transition - Validate business rules before applying bulk changes - Log all bulk changes in the AuditLog
### Department Transfers - Reassign multiple assets to a new department simultaneously - Automatically update assignment records with transfer date - Notify receiving department managers via Reminder alerts
### Data Exports - Export filtered or full asset lists for reporting and backup - Support for CSV, Excel, and PDF formats
## Key Responsibilities - Execute bulk operations with proper authorization (Admin/Manager) - Validate data integrity before and after bulk actions - Document bulk operations in audit records - Communicate bulk changes to affected stakeholders
## Related Entities - Asset, Department, Assignment, AuditLog, Reminder
skill.description: Ability to execute bulk asset operations such as multi-select status updates, department transfers, and data exports, as well as perform global search across all asset fields.
skill.name: Bulk Operations and Asset Search
